pages.text: 一大早，Sam 爸爸悄悄把咘咘叫醒：“嘘——今天是妈妈的生日哦！我们给她一个惊喜好不好？”Coco 从窗户探进头来：“Let’s make a surprise!”
pages.text_en: Early morning, Dad whispered to Bubu: Shh, today is Mom's birthday! Let's make a surprise! Coco poked her head through the window: Let's make a surprise!

pages.text: 咘咘和爸爸在厨房做蛋糕。咘咘搅拌面糊，搅得到处都是。Coco 递过来一颗草莓：“Strawberry! 放上去会很 pretty！”
pages.text_en: Bubu and Dad made a cake in the kitchen. Bubu stirred the batter, making a mess everywhere. Coco handed over a strawberry: Strawberry! It will look so pretty on top!

pages.text: 咘咘趴在桌上画了一张卡片。Coco 教她写字：“跟我写——Happy Birthday Mom！”咘咘歪歪扭扭地写了出来，好认真。
pages.text_en: Bubu lay on the table drawing a card. Coco taught her to write: Follow me, Happy Birthday Mom! Bubu wrote it out wobbly but so carefully.

pages.text: 爸爸吹气球，咘咘挂彩带。Coco 站在椅子上贴星星：“Beautiful! So colorful！好漂亮！”客厅变成了一个小派对现场。
pages.text_en: Dad blew up balloons while Bubu hung streamers. Coco stood on a chair sticking stars: Beautiful! So colorful! The living room became a little party scene.

pages.text: 门开了！妈妈回来了。“Surprise！”大家一起喊。妈妈捂住嘴巴，眼睛亮晶晶的：“天哪！这是给我的吗？”
pages.text_en: The door opened! Mom was home. Surprise! everyone shouted together. Mom covered her mouth, eyes sparkling: Oh my! Is this all for me?

pages.text: 蛋糕上插着彩色蜡烛。咘咘帮忙数：“一、二、三……”Coco 在旁边教英文：“One, two, three, four, five！”咘咘跟着念：“One...two...free！”
pages.text_en: Colorful candles stood on the cake. Bubu helped count: One, two, three... Coco taught English beside her: One, two, three, four, five! Bubu repeated: One...two...free!

pages.text: 蜡烛全部点亮了，闪闪发光。大家围着蛋糕唱生日歌。Coco 唱英文版：“Happy birthday to you~”咘咘大声跟唱：“Happy birthday dear 妈妈~”
pages.text_en: All the candles were lit, glowing warmly. Everyone gathered around the cake singing. Coco sang in English: Happy birthday to you~ Bubu sang along loudly: Happy birthday dear Mama~

pages.text: 妈妈闭上眼睛，双手合十，认真地许愿。咘咘安安静静地看着妈妈，好奇又期待。整个房间都安静下来了。
pages.text_en: Mom closed her eyes, hands together, making a wish. Bubu watched quietly, curious and expectant. The whole room fell silent.

pages.text: “呼——”妈妈一口气吹灭了所有蜡烛！咘咘拍手欢呼：“耶！灭了灭了！”Coco 开心地跳起来：“Make a wish came true！”
pages.text_en: Whooo - Mom blew out all the candles in one breath! Bubu clapped and cheered: Yay! They're out! Coco jumped happily: The wish came true!

pages.text: 爸爸切蛋糕。咘咘端起第一块，小心翼翼地递给妈妈：“妈妈，this is for you！第一块给你！”妈妈感动得亲了咘咘一下。
pages.text_en: Dad cut the cake. Bubu carefully carried the first slice to Mom: Mama, this is for you! The first piece is for you! Mom was so touched she kissed Bubu.

pages.text: 大家开心地吃蛋糕。咘咘吃得鼻子上、脸蛋上都是奶油。Coco 笑着说：“Yummy！你变成一个 cream monster 了！”咘咘也笑了：“I love cake！”
pages.text_en: Everyone happily ate cake. Bubu got cream all over her nose and cheeks. Coco laughed: Yummy! You've become a cream monster! Bubu laughed too: I love cake!

pages.text: 睡觉前，咘咘紧紧抱着妈妈：“妈妈我爱你！”Coco 在旁边小声提醒：“Say it in English!”咘咘大声说：“I love you Mom！I love you Dad！”NOMI 和 NONO 在窗台上看着，月光温温柔柔地洒进来。
pages.text_en: Before bed, Bubu hugged Mom tightly: Mama I love you! Coco whispered a reminder: Say it in English! Bubu said loudly: I love you Mom! I love you Dad! NOMI and NONO watched from the windowsill as soft moonlight streamed in.
